headline: YCG Has Strong Conviction in Linde plc (LIN)
summary: YCG LLC, an asset management firm, released its fourth quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the quarter, the S&P 500 Index returned 2.66%, and the S&P Global Broad Market Index returned 3.22%. thumbnail.caption: Linde (LIN) Gets Price Target Increase from BMO Capital Ahead of 2026 Outlook

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Linde (LIN) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Linde at about US$483.62 is still reasonably priced or already stretched, you are not alone. This article is built to help you frame that question clearly. The share price has moved around recently, with a 7.9% return over the past 30 days, a 5.0% decline over the last week, and returns of 12.7% year to date, 6.1% over 1 year, 49.7% over 3 years, and 91.8% over 5 years. These moves have kept Linde on many investors' watchlists, as the stock continues to attract...
